caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a blue short-sleeved button-down shirt with an "INFOOBJECTS" logo on the chest, stands in front of a white background featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE." He wears a thin headset microphone and speaks toward an unseen audience. Across the sequence, the man maintains a consistent position while gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points; in the final frame, he raises his left hand, pointing slightly upward. At the bottom of the scene, a blue banner contains the text "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015" along with smaller text that reads "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room San Jose, CA." To the left of the banner, a white graphic includes the text "#BigDataSV 2015." The background and on-screen graphics remain static as the man speaks and moves his arms.
